product: Delta Sharing to external Iceberg clients is in Public Preview
tagline: You can now share tables, materialized views, and streaming tables to external Iceberg clients such as Snowflake, Trino, Flink, and Spark.
what_it_does: You can now share tables, materialized views, and streaming tables to external Iceberg clients such as Snowflake, Trino, Flink, and Spark. External Iceberg clients can query shared Delta tables with zero copy access. For details, see Enable sharing to external Iceberg clients and Iceberg clients: Read shared data.
why_it_matters: Reduces operational overhead and unlocks new capabilities for data teams on Databricks.

capabilities.desc: Create catalogs from shares with the click of a button.

capabilities.title: Use Unity Catalog access controls
capabilities.desc: Use Unity Catalog access controls to grant access to shared tables.

capabilities.title: Query shared data using standard
capabilities.desc: Query shared data using standard Unity Catalog syntax.

key_takeaway: You can now share tables, materialized views, and streaming tables to external Iceberg clients such as Snowflake, Trino, Flink, and Spark.
